# thundercompute_ssh_key (Resource)

Manages an SSH key in the Thunder Compute organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "thundercompute_ssh_key" "deploy" {
  name       = "deploy-key"
  public_key = file("~/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub")
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Display name for the SSH key.
- `public_key` (String) SSH public key content.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (Number) Unix timestamp of key creation.
- `fingerprint` (String) SSH key fingerprint.
- `id` (String) SSH key ID.
- `key_type` (String) SSH key type (e.g. ssh-rsa, ssh-ed25519).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import thundercompute_ssh_key.example <ssh-key-id>
```
